policies.title: Refund policy rewrite (draft)

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Draft rewrite of the refund policy for review.

sections.heading: When it applies
sections.content: Use during internal policy review and testing.

sections.heading: Rules
sections.content: - Draft content only; do not apply to customers.

sections.heading: Allowed actions
sections.content: - Review and provide feedback on proposed language.

sections.heading: Disallowed actions
sections.content: - Enforce this draft policy in production.

sections.heading: Required wording
sections.content: "This is a draft policy under review and not yet effective."

sections.heading: Examples
sections.content: A reviewer flags missing edge cases and requests clarification.

# Summary
Draft rewrite of the refund policy for review.

# When it applies
Use during internal policy review and testing.

# Rules
- Draft content only; do not apply to customers.

# Allowed actions
- Review and provide feedback on proposed language.

# Disallowed actions
- Enforce this draft policy in production.

# Required wording
"This is a draft policy under review and not yet effective."

# Escalation
Escalate questions to Policy Ops.

# Examples
A reviewer flags missing edge cases and requests clarification.
